cases.name: 1. pilot off legacy create succeeds (tenantId NULL)
2. pilot A create stamps tenantId = A
3. pilot A create for tenant B employee raises NotFound
5. tenant A update on tenant A row succeeds
6. tenant A update on tenant B row rejected
7. tenant B row unchanged after rejected update
8. tenant A delete on tenant A row succeeds
9. tenant A delete on tenant B row rejected
10. tenant B row unchanged after rejected delete
11. bulkApply tenant A creates rows tagged tenant A
12. bulkApply tenant B emp rejected; no rows
13. NULL-tenant legacy row not mutated under pilot
14. concurrent ALS frames stamp correct tenantId
15. audit row tenant A mutation carries tenantId=A (audit pilot ON)
16. rejected tenant B mutation does not emit audit row
17. exportExcel under tenant A refuses tenant B employee
